findings.fix: Drop the inline font-family override and the font-display class so the h2 renders as Inter 22/700.

findings.message: RoleRouteSync calls setRole from a pathname effect to keep the 'Viewing as' label in sync with the URL. This is route-driven, not interactive UI, so it is not a second user-facing switcher, but it does write to the role store from a third surface. Worth a documentation note in the role-store comment block.
findings.fix: Add a comment to role-store and to role-route-sync explaining the route-derived write path so the single-switcher rule is unambiguous.
